---
title: "delfi graphs"
author: "Trish"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:



Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.

```{r raise libraries}
library(tidyverse)

```
```{r read in data filesets}
delfi <- list.files("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/FinaleDB/delfiStyleData", pattern = "tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

delfi <- delfi %>%
  set_names(basename(.)) %>%
  map_dfr(
    ~ read.delim(.x), 
    .id = "file"
  )

#Adding cancer and control labels to dataframe

delfi <- delfi %>%
  mutate(
    treatment = case_when(
      str_detect(file, "Ascite") ~ "Cancer",
      str_detect(file, "PF") ~ "Control"
    )
  )

```
```{r genome in order of chromosomes}

delfi <- delfi %>% 
  rename(chr = X.contig)

chrom_order <- as.character(1:22)

delfi <- delfi %>%
  mutate(chr = factor(chr, levels = chrom_order)) %>%
  arrange(chr, start) %>%
  group_by(file) %>%
  mutate(genome_bin = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

```
```{r boxplot of delfi ratios}

ggplot(delfi,
       aes(x = treatment, 
           y = ratio_corrected,
           fill = treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "DELFI Ratios for each treatment",
       y = "DELFI Ratio")

ggsave("delfi_boxplot.png")

```

```{r violin plots}

ggplot(delfi,
       aes(x = treatment,
           y = ratio_corrected,
           fill = treatment)) +
  geom_violin() +
  labs(title = "DELFI Ratios for each treatment",
       y = "DELFI Ratio")

ggsave("delphi_violinplot.png")
```

```{r histogram}

ggplot(delfi,
       aes(ratio_corrected, 
           fill = treatment)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  labs(title = "Histogram of DELFI Ratios")

ggsave("delfi_histogram.png")
```

```{r looking at samples}

delfi <- delfi %>%
  mutate(short_name = sub("-rmdup.*", "", file))

sample_summary <- delfi %>%
  group_by(short_name, treatment)%>%
  summarise(
    mean_ratio = mean(ratio_corrected)
  )

ggplot(sample_summary,
       aes(short_name, mean_ratio,
           fill = treatment)) + 
  geom_col() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)
  ) +
  labs(title = "Mean DELFI ratio for each Sample",
       y = "Mean DELFI Score",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Treatment") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))

ggsave("DELFI_sample_scores.png")

```

```{r Cristiano style delfi plots}

#for all samples
ggplot(delfi,
       aes(genome_bin,
           ratio_corrected, 
           colour = treatment,
           group = file)) + 
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Cristiano style DELFI plots",
       y = "DELFI ratio",
       x = "genome bin",
       fill = "Treatment")
ggsave("Cristiano Style DELFI plot.png")

```
```{r plotting mean values for Cristiano style plot}

delfi_mean_values <- delfi %>%
  group_by(genome_bin, treatment) %>%
  summarise(mean_Delfi_score = mean(ratio_corrected))%>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(delfi_mean_values, 
  aes(genome_bin,
           mean_Delfi_score, 
           colour = treatment)) + 
  geom_line(alpha = 1) +
  labs(title = "Cristiano style (mean) DELFI plots",
       y = "DELFI (mean)ratio",
       x = "genome bin",
       fill = "Treatment")
  
ggsave("Mean DELFI Plots.png")

```
```{r combining the DELFI plots (indiviual and mean)}

ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = delfi,
            aes(genome_bin,
           ratio_corrected, 
           colour = treatment,
           group = file),
           alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(data = delfi_mean_values, 
            aes(genome_bin,
           mean_Delfi_score, 
           colour = treatment), 
           alpha = 1) +
  labs(title = "Cristiano Style DELFI Plots",
       subtitle = "Individual Samples with Mean Values Superimposed",
       y = "DELFI Ratio",
       x = "genome bin",
       colour = "Treatment")

ggsave("Combined_mean_and_samples_DELFI.png")

```
